summary: Iteration_11 frontend-only verification of the /discovery-process full content rewrite (10 rows). All 15 requested checks PASS: hero copy + lede, Starting Point ('We don't' / 'we stand behind'), Multi-site H2 (no 'Four to eight weeks' in H2, 'Senior practitioners deploy'), What We Study now 4-col with correct order (Processes/Systems/Tools/People & Behaviors) plus new items (Hour-by-hour tracking, Reliability systems, Communication flow structures), Week One ('your team has' / bullets end in periods), Week Two ('We lay out' / 'output isn’t templated'), 5 Deliverables with correct headings and reworded #4, Skin in the Game stats (250+/100%/3) + new italic caption 'Annualized savings rate. ROI. Weekly cash flow.', Phase 2 ('Senior practitioners deploy'), Phase 3 ('We provide') with 5-item list in correct order (annualized savings rate and ROI split), CTA with Link to /contact, phone/email correct. Hero depth = 788px at 1440x900 (matches /approach + /case-studies post iteration_9 fix). study-grid computed grid-template-columns: 4 tracks @1440, 2 tracks @1100, 1 track @600. All 5 internal React Router Links (discovery-multisite-contact, discovery-link-approach-inline, discovery-link-cases-inline, discovery-link-approach, discovery-final-cta) confirmed to perform SPA navigation (window-level marker persisted across click; URL changed to the target route without full document reload). Zero JS console errors on /discovery-process.
critical_code_review_comments: DiscoveryProcess.jsx is ~640 lines but largely declarative copy + scoped <style> block; readable and well-structured. No DRY violations.
All internal navigation correctly uses React Router <Link>. data-testid attributes present on every requested interactive element.

Note for future Playwright runs against this page: native el.click() via page.evaluate is the most reliable way to trigger React Router Link clicks here — Playwright's locator.click() intermittently times out because the sticky BriefHeader and .brief-doc-inner can intercept pointer events during scroll-into-view. The links themselves are functional in real browsers (verified via JS-dispatched click which exercises the same SPA path).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_11 is GREEN. /discovery-process is fully aligned with the 2026-02-24 client draft. Hero depth (788px @1440x900) is consistent with the iteration_9 fix and identical to /approach + /case-studies. When testing React Router Link clicks on this page from Playwright, prefer page.evaluate('document.querySelector(testid).click()') over locator.click() to avoid sticky-header interception flakes during scroll. The .study-grid responsive breakpoints (4→2→1) are confirmed via computed style.
